creator: fsbruva@yahoo.com
text:
Needs to be marked broken, because latest update is uninstallable.

As noted by the upstream bug report: https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/issues/405678

The gitlab-ce dependency on gitlab-shell results in an unresolvable dependency conflict. Gitlab-ce cannot be built without krb5, gitlab-shell cannot be built without heimdal. Since krb5 conflicts with heimdal that gets installed when gitlab-shell does, there is no way to install gitlab-ce.
